[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”75px||60px||false|false” border_width_top=”1px” border_color_top=”#2B59C0″ border_color_bottom=”#2b59c0″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/flow-tshirt.jpg” title_text=”flow-tshirt” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.17.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” text_font_size=”21px” header_font=”Gruppo|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”left” header_text_color=”#232323″ header_font_size=”25px” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_2_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_2_font_size=”35px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” custom_margin=”||19px|||” hover_enabled=”0″ header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″]

FLOW DRY-FIT TSHIRT

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

A comfortable and modern Tshirt.

Flow Dry-FIT T-shirts are our new high-performance, comfortable, lightweight, polyester fabric shirts that move sweat away from the body and to the fabric surface, where it evaporates.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]

excerpt.rendered: FLOW DRY-FIT TSHIRTA comfortable and modern Tshirt. Flow Dry-FIT T-shirts are our new high-performance, comfortable, lightweight, polyester fabric shirts that move sweat away from the body and to the fabric surface, where it evaporates.
